questions.question: Does BackupPayload have version:1 and createdAt fields?
Does collectBackupPayload read all required localStorage keys (settings, userProfile, selectedTopics, progress, studyTimes, scoreSyncSeq)?
Does collectBackupPayload load groups from IDB and include member scores, profiles, and chat messages per group?
Are chat messages truncated to the last 10 per group?
Do uint8ArrayToBase64 and base64ToUint8Array round-trip correctly?
Is MLS group state base64-encoded in groupStates?
Do all baseline tests (129) plus new tests pass?
